caption: A man with short brown hair and a greyish beard is filmed from the chest up, positioned in front of a plain beige wall. He wears a black t-shirt featuring a colorful graphic of a space shuttle and the word "NASA" in white letters. Behind him, a rustic wooden American flag hangs on the left, and a dark movie poster featuring a silhouette and the text "ERSAL SOLDIER" is visible on the right. A black microphone boom arm enters the frame from the left side. Throughout the clip, the man speaks directly to the camera. In the beginning, he gestures with both hands, palms facing inward, as he speaks. As the video progresses, his hands lower toward his lap, and his facial expression shifts from an active talking pose with an open mouth to a more neutral, closed-mouth expression.
